message.content:
1) Yes, there is a brand logo marquee with scrolling company names (Webflow, HubSpot, Unbounce, etc.).  
2) Yes, there is a stats section with numbers (9,873+, 34%, 2,468+, <10s).  
3) Yes, there are feature cards (the stats are presented as individual cards with icons and labels).  

Visual quality rating: 8/10 (clean, modern design with good typography and spacing, though the marquee could be more dynamic; overall cohesive and professional).
